name: Granedilla Fridge Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the biscuits and mix with melted butter to form a pie crust.
2. Line the base and sides of a pie dish with the crust mixture, pressing it down well.
3. Place the lined pie dish in the freezer to set the crust.
4. Prepare the lemon jelly according to the instructions on the box.
5. To the prepared jelly, add the sweetened condensed milk and Granedilla pulp, mixing well.
6. Pour the mixture into the pie crust and place it in the refrigerator to set.
ENJOY!!
